step_rationale: Regulates endothelial function; dysregulated in endothelial dysfunction and post-MI remodeling.
mechanism: miR-145 dysregulation promotes endothelial dysfunction during plaque evolution and predicts post-MI adverse outcomes.

references.title: MicroRNA-145 is involved in endothelial cell dysfunction and acts as a promising biomarker of acute coronary syndrome.
Prediction of long-term outcome after acute myocardial infarction using circulating miR-145.
references.journal: Scandinavian journal of clinical and laboratory investigation
